task_context.actionable_question: How active am I compared to classmates?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Describe effort level in plain language using study_effort_level, total_engagement_count, active_days, engagement_score, and class_avg_engagement_score. Compare to class averages only from returned fields, and avoid calling missing engagement data low effort.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: It looks like you haven't engaged with the course at all this semester, which is quite different from your classmates. Your total engagement count, active days, and engagement score are all at zero, indicating that you haven't participated in any activities.

Insights: Lack of Engagement: You have a total engagement count of 0, which means you haven't interacted with the course materials or activities. This is concerning as it suggests you may not be keeping up with the course.

Educational implications: Without engagement, it's challenging to grasp the course content and succeed academically.

Recommendations: high - Start participating in course activities immediately. - Engaging with the course will help you understand the material better and improve your overall performance.

explanation.summary: It looks like you haven't engaged with the course at all this semester, which is quite different from your classmates. Your total engagement count, active days, and engagement score are all at zero, indicating that you haven't participated in any activities.

insights.title: Lack of Engagement
insights.description: You have a total engagement count of 0, which means you haven't interacted with the course materials or activities. This is concerning as it suggests you may not be keeping up with the course.

educational_implications: Without engagement, it's challenging to grasp the course content and succeed academically.

recommendations.action: Start participating in course activities immediately.
recommendations.rationale: Engaging with the course will help you understand the material better and improve your overall performance.

confidence.reason: Data clearly indicates no engagement activity.

required_core_outputs.description: Characterise the student's effort level relative to the available class benchmark in plain language.

evaluation_constraints.description: Ground the characterisation in study_effort_level, total_engagement_count, active_days, engagement_score, and class_avg_engagement_score when those fields are returned.
Do not label missing engagement data as low effort.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
